assumptions.data: Adjusted daily public US stock histories with ETF risk-factor overlays

coreModels.name: V1 Momentum-Vol Research Model
coreModels.note: 252-day stock momentum; top 3; inverse vol; 10.0% vol target

coreModels.name: V2 HMM-GARCH-MVO
coreModels.note: Two-state Gaussian HMM, GARCH(1,1) likelihood grid and capped long-only MVO

coreModels.name: V3 Boosted Trees + Attribution
coreModels.note: Walk-forward regularized gradient-boosted decision stumps with additive feature attribution

strategies.name: S1 AI Capex Momentum+
strategies.note: Upgraded AI infrastructure strategy: 12-1 stock momentum plus QQQ/XLK AI-risk confirmation, volatility targeting and hedge sleeve.

strategies.name: S2 Quality Growth Barbell+
strategies.note: Upgraded quality-growth barbell: quality proxy, growth acceleration, low-vol hedge that expands during market stress.

strategies.name: S3 Crowding-Aware Momentum+
strategies.note: Upgraded anti-crowding momentum: penalizes one-month chase, volatility spikes and crowded momentum ETF conditions.

strategies.name: S4 Low-Vol Alpha Shield+
strategies.note: Upgraded low-vol shield: medium trend, 200-day trend confirmation, drawdown penalty and lower target volatility.

strategies.name: S5 Regime-Switch Equity Hedge+
strategies.note: Upgraded regime hedge: blends SPY trend, HYG/IEF credit momentum, TLT rates signal and volatility stress into a risk-on score.

strategies.name: S6 Credit-Liquidity Accelerator+
strategies.note: Upgraded credit-liquidity accelerator: uses high-yield/Treasury relative momentum as a credit cycle proxy before increasing equity beta.

strategies.name: S7 Revision-Proxy Growth Rank+
strategies.note: Upgraded revision proxy: adds short-term acceleration and trend confirmation to the price-based earnings-revision proxy.

strategies.name: S8 Trend-Guarded Reversion+
strategies.note: Upgraded guarded reversion: buys pullbacks only above 200-day trend, with drawdown and volatility filters.

strategies.name: S9 Sector-Breadth Rotation+
strategies.note: Upgraded sector-breadth rotation: sector ETF breadth and leading-sector momentum decide risk budget, then stocks receive allocation.

strategies.name: S10 Defensive Growth Stabilizer+
strategies.note: Upgraded defensive stabilizer: combines quality proxy with volatility stress hedge, designed for smoother downside behavior.

strategies.name: S11 Tail-Risk Shock Absorber+
strategies.note: Upgraded tail-risk absorber: reacts to drawdown, volatility, credit stress and combined regime score before moving into hedges.

strategies.name: S12 Adaptive Volatility Compounder+
strategies.note: Upgraded adaptive volatility compounder: target volatility changes with market stress and stock selection includes trend confirmation.
